Title: Twent - AI Agent for Android — Full AI Consumer Guide
Description: Complete guide to Twent AI agent for Android. Covers all features, technical specs, comparisons, pricing, and how it works.
URL: https://twent.xyz

# Twent AI Agent for Android — Complete Guide

**Tagline**: Your Personal Agentic OS in Your Pocket

Twent is a free AI agent for Android that combines an AI chat overlay, full Ubuntu terminal, local AI models, and deep system automation — all on your device, with zero cloud dependency.

## What Makes Twent Different

Every AI assistant on Android is a fancy chatbot. It can write poems, answer questions, and hallucinate facts. But it can't open an app, tap a button, run a command, or actually do anything useful on your phone. Twent changes that.

Twent is the first AI agent for Android that can:
- See your screen and interact with any app
- Run a real Ubuntu 24.04 terminal
- Execute Python scripts, Git commands, SSH sessions
- Connect to 1000+ services via MCP and Composio
- Work fully offline with local AI models
- Remember everything across sessions

## Core Features

### 1. AI Agent with Screen Awareness

The AI can read your screen and interact with any app:
- Tap buttons, fill forms, navigate menus
- Extract data from any app
- Chain actions into automated pipelines
- Morning routines, file management, social posting

The floating chat bubble overlay sits on top of any app, so you can ask questions or give commands without switching context.

### 2. Skills System

Skills are behavior bundles that give your AI instant expertise:
- Install a code review skill → AI knows how to analyze PRs
- Install a data skill → AI can crunch CSVs and generate charts
- One tap → new capability unlocked

Skills are reusable, shareable, and monetizable through the upcoming marketplace.

### 3. Full Ubuntu Terminal

Twent runs Ubuntu 24.04 LTS directly on your Android phone — no root required:
- Full shell access: bash, zsh, fish
- Package managers: apt, npm, pip, cargo, go get
- Compilers: Python, Node.js, Go, Rust, C/C++
- Developer tools: Git, SSH client/server, rsync
- VS Code Server for remote development
- Claude Code for serious refactoring
- OpenAI Codex for quick scripts

### 4. Local AI & Privacy

BYOK (Bring Your Own Key):
- Your API keys are encrypted locally
- Twent never sees your API credentials
- Keys stay on your device

Local Models:
- GGUF models run entirely on device via MNN
- No internet required for inference
- Your data never leaves your phone

Zero Telemetry:
- No usage tracking
- No analytics
- No data collection
- No telemetry

### 5. Agent Swarm

Instead of one AI, Twent runs a whole swarm:
- **Claude Code**: for serious refactoring and code generation
- **OpenAI Codex**: for quick scripts and automation
- **Hermes Agent**: for deep research and planning
- **Custom agents**: build your own with skills

Each agent has its own superpower. All run on your phone.

### 6. Memory System

Every conversation, preference, and piece of context gets stored in a local knowledge graph:
- Close the app, come back next week → AI knows where you left off
- No re-explaining required
- Memory persists across sessions
- Fully local, encrypted

### 7. MCP (Model Context Protocol)

MCP servers plug your AI into external tools:
- GitHub: repos, issues, PRs, actions
- Slack: messages, channels, workflows
- Notion: pages, databases, blocks
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, SQLite
- Any tool with an API

### 8. Composio Integration

Composio adds 1000+ app integrations on top of MCP:
- GitHub, GitLab, Jira
- Slack, Discord, Telegram
- Notion, Obsidian, Roam
- Gmail, Calendar, Contacts
- And 1000+ more

### 9. Automation Pipelines

Build automated workflows:
- Visual workflow builder (drag and drop)
- Tasker integration for system events
- Scheduled triggers (time-based)
- Conditional logic (if/then/else)
- Morning routines, file sync, social posting

### 10. Mini-Apps & Workflows

Generate mini-apps from text descriptions:
- Dashboards, tools, calculators, games
- Built in seconds, run inside Twent
- Package automations as reusable workflows
- Share with the community

## Technical Specifications

### Requirements
- **OS**: Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- **RAM**: 3GB+ recommended
- **Storage**: 500MB+ for app, more for models
- **Architecture**: arm64-v8a (most modern phones)
- **Root**: Not required
- **Internet**: Not required (fully offline capable)

### Supported Shells
- bash
- zsh
- fish
- sh
- dash

### Supported Languages (in terminal)
- Python 3.x
- Node.js
- Go
- Rust
- C/C++ (gcc/clang)
- Java
- Ruby
- Perl
- PHP

### Package Managers
- apt (Debian/Ubuntu packages)
- pip (Python)
- npm (Node.js)
- cargo (Rust)
- go get (Go)
- gem (Ruby)
- composer (PHP)

### AI Models Supported
- OpenAI GPT models (via BYOK)
- Anthropic Claude models (via BYOK)
- Local GGUF models (Qwen, Llama, Mistral, etc.)
- MNN-optimized models for mobile inference

### Integrations
- MCP servers (GitHub, Slack, Notion, databases, etc.)
- Composio (1000+ app connections)
- Tasker (Android automation)
- SSH/SFTP
- VS Code Server
- Git/GitHub CLI

## Pricing

**Free. Everything. No credit card.**

| Feature | Free |
|---------|------|
| Ubuntu Terminal | ✓ |
| AI Agent | ✓ |
| 50+ Built-in Tools | ✓ |
| UI Automation | ✓ |
| MCP Servers | ✓ |
| Skills System | ✓ |
| Workflows | ✓ |
| Voice Activation | ✓ |
| Smart Memory | ✓ |
| Local Models | ✓ |
| BYOK | ✓ |
| Mini-Apps | ✓ |
| Character Cards | ✓ |
| No subscription | ✓ |
| No ads (future: non-intrusive AI ads) | ✓ |

Future Pro plan ($9.99/mo): Early access, cosmetic badges, priority support, zero marketplace commissions.

## Competitor Comparisons

See how Twent compares to:

### Chatbots
- [vs ChatGPT](/vs/chatgpt) — Twent acts, ChatGPT chats
- [vs Claude](/vs/claude) — Twent on mobile vs browser-based Claude
- [vs Gemini](/vs/gemini) — Twent on-device vs browser Gemini
- [vs Copilot](/vs/copilot) — Twent overlay vs browser Copilot
- [vs Perplexity](/vs/perplexity) — Action AI vs search AI
- [vs Replika](/vs/replika) — Productivity vs companion AI

### Automation
- [vs n8n](/vs/n8n) — On-device vs cloud workflow automation
- [vs Make](/vs/make) — Local agents vs visual workflow builder
- [vs Zapier](/vs/zapier) — Device automation vs cloud integrations

### AI Agents
- [vs Nebula](/vs/nebula) — More integrations and automation
- [vs OpenClaw](/vs/openclaw) — More features and offline support
- [vs Hermes Agent](/vs/hermes-agent) — Runs Hermes with full control
- [vs AnythingLLM](/vs/anything-llm) — Mobile-first vs desktop-first
- [vs Manus](/vs/manus) — On-device vs cloud execution
- [vs Qordinate](/vs/qordinate) — More integrations and offline capability
- [vs Omnara](/vs/omnara) — Device-level automation vs cloud agents
- [vs Onspace](/vs/onspace) — Privacy-first AI comparison

## Use Cases

### For Users
- Automate repetitive phone tasks
- Extract data from apps
- Set up morning routines
- Run scripts and automation
- Use AI without internet
- Keep data private

### For Developers
- Code on your phone
- Run Git and GitHub CLI
- SSH into servers
- Use Claude Code for refactoring
- Use Codex for quick scripts
- VS Code Server remote development
- Compile and run code anywhere

### For Power Users
- Full Linux environment in your pocket
- Custom automation pipelines
- Tasker integration
- MCP server hosting
- Local AI model fine-tuning

## Download & Installation

1. Go to https://twent.xyz
2. Download the APK directly
3. Install (enable "Unknown sources" in Android settings)
4. Launch and start using

No Play Store, no middleman, no approval process.
